name: allowance-mcp
description: Payment security for AI agents. Agents request scoped human approval, receive limited virtual cards, complete checkout, and report receipts without seeing the human's real card.

auth.note: Complete Allowance OAuth from your MCP client. The client sends the OAuth-issued bearer token on tool calls.

flow.summary: Create an allowance request for a purchase, wait for phone approval, then complete checkout in local or remote mode.
flow.local_checkout: After approval, the agent uses contact, shipping, billing, card, and result-reporting tools to complete checkout in its browser session.
flow.remote_checkout: If the approved request returns checkout_mode='remote', Allowance completes checkout and the agent waits with wait_for_remote_fulfillment.
flow.human_gate: The human approval on phone is the spending authorization. After approval, the agent should not ask for another final confirmation unless the realized total exceeds the approved cap or checkout requires unavailable information.

tools.name: send_allowance_request
tools.description: Create a human approval request for a scoped purchase allowance.

tools.name: poll_allowance_request
tools.description: Check the current status of an allowance request once.

tools.name: wait_for_allowance_request
tools.description: Wait for a request to be approved, denied, canceled, expired, failed, or timed out.

tools.name: get_allowance_request
tools.description: Fetch details for one allowance request.

tools.name: list_allowance_requests
tools.description: List allowance requests for the connected account.

tools.name: cancel_allowance_request
tools.description: Cancel a pending allowance request.

tools.name: get_contact_details
tools.description: Fetch non-secret checkout contact fields such as name, email, and phone.

tools.name: get_allowance_shipping_address
tools.description: Fetch the approved shipping address for an allowance that requires shipping.

tools.name: get_allowance_billing_address
tools.description: Fetch billing address fields for checkout.

tools.name: issue_allowance_card
tools.description: Issue payment credentials for an approved local-checkout allowance.

tools.name: complete_purchase_auth
tools.description: Fetch card credentials after required phone authorization for a purchase attempt.

tools.name: report_purchase_success
tools.description: Report a completed purchase and charged amount.

tools.name: report_purchase_failure
tools.description: Report a failed purchase attempt with error details.

tools.name: list_allowance_purchase_attempts
tools.description: List purchase attempts for an allowance.

tools.name: get_allowance
tools.description: Fetch details for a specific allowance.

tools.name: wait_for_remote_fulfillment
tools.description: Wait for Allowance-owned remote checkout to finish or request human input.

tools.name: reply_to_remote_fulfillment_message
tools.description: Send the human's reply to a remote fulfillment prompt.

tools.name: list_allowances
tools.description: List allowances for the connected account.

tools.name: pause_allowance
tools.description: Pause an allowance.

tools.name: revoke_allowance
tools.description: Revoke an allowance.

tools.name: list_supported_merchants
tools.description: List merchants that support no-browser remote checkout.

tools.name: check_merchant
tools.description: Check whether a merchant URL can be purchased from the current session.
